text.tspan: Data engineer with 6 years building
production data systems
- from ingesting market feeds for
3,000+ securities
to designing
credit scoring pipelines
from scratch as a startup's
first data hire
. M.Sc. in AI (VU Amsterdam,
Databricks Certified Data Engineer Professional with strong data quality and system reliability focus.

svg.text: Thesis: Uncertainty Quantification in Deep RL
Coursework: Data Mining (9.0), Deep Learning (9.5), Sequence Analysis (9.0)
Top university in China with strong quantitative and systems training.
GLP Technology, Shanghai - Lead Data Engineer

text.tspan: • First technical hire at a lending fintech; built the credit risk data platform from raw
data ingestion through automated decisioning and post-loan monitoring.
• Engineered the core decision engine with 29 rejection rules, 36 borrower segments,
and a 19-feature early-delinquency scorecard for first-payment default prediction.
• Built daily ETL for 30+ production tables into AWS Redshift and a bureau parser that
converted nested JSON reports into 5 analytical tables.
Technical Skills:
Python, PySpark, AWS, SQL, ETL, Credit Risk
• Built market data ingestion pipelines for 3,000+ A-share securities and 5+ years of
tick-level futures data, with corporate action handling and deduplication.
• Built a systematic alpha research pipeline using Fama-MacBeth regression to validate
4 factor families; validated signals were integrated into the live portfolio.
Technical Skills:
Python, NumPy, Pandas, SQL, Factor Modeling, Backtesting
• Built an anti-fraud system that identified 51,000+ suspicious order clusters across
2.2M+ users using 3 pattern algorithms during hyper-growth.
• Optimized 90+ Hadoop/Hive queries, cutting scan volume 5x and enabling real-time
analytics across 30+ warehouse tables for operations and fraud teams.
Technical Skills:
SQL, Hadoop, Hive, Python
• Built an automated pipeline to ingest, validate, and consolidate Excel reports from
20+ business units, reducing monthly processing from 2 days to under 2 hours.
Technical Skills:
Excel, VBA, Data Automation, SQL, Data Quality
• Built batch ETL for 3,842 JSON sensor snapshots using PySpark and Delta Lake in a
Bronze/Silver/Gold medallion design with idempotent SHA-256 reprocessing.
Technical Skills:
PySpark, Delta Lake, Medallion Architecture

svg.text: M.Sc. Thesis: UQ in Deep RL

text.tspan: • Built a benchmarking framework for 5 uncertainty-quantification methods across 150+
HPC runs; QR-DQN achieved 31% lower CRPS than ensemble and dropout baselines.
Technical Skills:
PyTorch, Deep RL, Statistical Testing, HPC/SLURM
Languages & Core:
Python (Expert), SQL (Expert), Bash
Data Engineering:
PySpark, Spark, Delta Lake, Databricks, ETL/ELT
Cloud & DevOps:
AWS, Docker, Airflow, CI/CD, Git
Databases:
PostgreSQL, MySQL, Hadoop, Hive
ML/AI:
Pandas, NumPy, PyTorch, XGBoost, LightGBM, scikit-learn
